entries.summary: Director-level technology leader with 30 years of progressive experience guiding digital transformation, IT operations, AI readiness, and modern workplace modernization for SMB, mid-market, and mission-driven organizations. Combines hands-on operational fluency across Microsoft 365, SharePoint Online, Microsoft Azure, Identity and Access Management, and Zero Trust Architecture with strategic roadmap ownership, vendor-aligned governance, and cross-functional stakeholder alignment. Track record of reducing IT spending, modernizing collaboration platforms, leading post-incident recovery, and translating technical requirements into clear business outcomes across healthcare, legal, real estate, and mission-driven SMB clients. Currently leading enterprise AI adoption through context engineering, prompt engineering, and developer enablement.
entries.skills: Modern Workplace and Technology Enablement: Microsoft 365, Microsoft Teams, SharePoint Online, OneDrive for Business, Exchange Online, Microsoft Copilot, Viva Suite, Power Platform, Microsoft Intune, Microsoft Entra ID (Azure Active Directory), hybrid work solutions, unified communications, employee experience platform, digital asset management. Cloud Computing and Migrations: Microsoft Azure, Amazon Web Services (AWS), Google Cloud Platform (GCP), IaaS, PaaS, SaaS, multi-cloud, cloud migration strategy, lift-and-shift, re-platforming, FinOps, Azure Migrate, CloudEndure, Metalogix, ShareGate, SPMT. Cybersecurity, Compliance, and Identity: Zero Trust Architecture, Identity and Access Management (IAM), Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA), Single Sign-On (SSO), HIPAA, SOC 2, ISO 27001, GDPR, IT governance, risk assessment, audit management, vulnerability assessment, penetration testing, incident response, network segmentation, business continuity planning (BCP), disaster recovery planning (DRP). AI Adoption and Applied AI: AI adoption strategy, AI readiness assessments, context engineering, prompt engineering, AI literacy enablement, model evaluation, responsible AI use, AI workflow integration, OpenAI, Anthropic, Google AI, Hugging Face, Ollama, LM Studio, local LLMs. Data, BI, and Analytics: Power BI, Tableau, Excel, dashboard design, business intelligence reporting, data visualization, KPI definition, executive reporting. Process Automation and Performance Improvement: Power Automate, UI Path, Nintex, K2, Zapier, Bitrix24, Robotic Process Automation (RPA), Business Process Management (BPM), Lean Six Sigma, business process reengineering, intelligent automation, hyperautomation. Information Architecture and ECM: SharePoint Online, SharePoint Server 2013/2016/2019, Drupal, Joomla, WordPress, Confluence Cloud, Atlassian Suite, Azure DevOps, JIRA, LiveTiles, taxonomy design, metadata management, knowledge management, information governance. Virtualization, Containers, and Infrastructure as Code: Hyper-V, VMware vSphere, ESXi, Virtuozzo, Docker, Docker Compose, Kubernetes, Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS), Amazon EKS, Helm, Balena, Terraform, Ansible, Azure Resource Manager (ARM), Bicep, CloudFormation, GitOps, ArgoCD, Jenkins. Databases and Backend: SQL Server, MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Azure SQL Database, Cosmos DB, DynamoDB, Redis, Firebase, T-SQL, stored procedures, database optimization, data warehousing. Web Application Development: LAMP stack, HTML5, CSS3, PHP, JavaScript, TypeScript, REST APIs, GraphQL, microservices, Node.js, React, Angular, Vue.js, JSON, XML, SOAP, Single Page Applications (SPA), Progressive Web Apps (PWA), responsive design, Bootstrap, Tailwind CSS, IIS, Apache, NGINX, Tomcat, WebSphere. Scripting and Automation: PowerShell, Python, Bash. Linux Administration: Red Hat / RHEL, Ubuntu, Debian, CentOS, Mint, Raspbian. SDLC and Delivery: Agile, Scrum, Waterfall, CI/CD pipelines. UX and Experience Augmentation: CLI, GUI, VUI, VRI. ---

entries.summary: Digital transformation leader with 28 years of strategic vision across enterprise systems, public-mission organizations, cloud and data platforms, cybersecurity, and modern workplace. Drives modernization roadmaps, lifecycle management of operational and administrative software systems, and operational readiness inside highly regulated environments. Establishes technical standards, governance steering committees, and change-enablement programs at scale; reduced enterprise IT spending by $1.2M through information-architecture redesign and led a no-downtime migration of five SharePoint farms with zero interruption to emergency-care operations. Operationally fluent on incident, problem, change, and release management; led a 30-day on-site ransomware response, directing containment, negotiation, forensic analysis, re-architecture, and team training to harden the environment. Champions adoption of contemporary and emerging technologies including AI, cloud migration, automation, and Microsoft 365, translating technical requirements into measurable business value. Holds BS Electrical Engineering (Notre Dame), MS Information Systems (MIT), and Master of Technology in Digital Transformation (MIT Sloan). Trusted across multi-million-dollar IT portfolios, statewide cloud-first programs, and cross-functional teams.

experience.position: Modern Workplace Consultancy | AI Adoption Program Lead, Software Engineering Transformation
bullets: Championed adoption of structured context-engineering and prompt-engineering practices across an engineering organization transitioning from ad hoc prompting to repeatable, measurable AI-augmented workflows.
Established operational readiness by building a training curriculum and reusable frameworks tying AI usage directly to productivity and code-quality KPIs.
Provided executive direction to leadership on responsible AI deployment, change management, and long-term strategic adoption.
Translated emerging-technology evaluation (OpenAI, Anthropic, local LLMs) into tangible engineering outcomes and team-level performance metrics.
Delivered training and knowledge management programs that improved adoption and reduced time-to-productivity for newly onboarded engineers.

Led a cross-functional incident-response team through a full ransomware recovery cycle (threat assessment, system isolation, negotiation, coordinated restoration) following a SonicWall router exploit.
Directed forensic containment and negotiations with threat actors, minimizing data loss and restoring uptime within a 30-day stabilization window.
Re-architected core information systems with segmentation and monitoring frameworks to harden the environment against repeat exploits.
Implemented technical playbooks for rapid incident, problem, change, and release management aligned to incident-response best practice.
Trained internal staff on incident-response methodology, containment, and post-breach remediation, transferring durable capability to the in-house team.
Conducted post-incident root-cause analysis and instituted preventive controls aligned to the organization's risk management posture.

experience.position: DTIG | UX Strategy and Digital Transformation Consultant
bullets: Led digital transformation engagements across healthcare and business environments, developing modernization roadmaps grounded in business, clinical, and IT assessments.
Designed digital workplace solutions on Microsoft 365, Microsoft Teams, and SharePoint Online to improve collaboration and reduce operational friction.
Directed cloud migration and modernization across multiple platforms using lift-and-shift and re-platforming approaches.
Championed evaluation and adoption of emerging technologies, including AI, automation, and digital tools, to support organizational readiness.
Established change-enablement programs that improved cross-functional alignment by translating technical requirements into clear business outcomes.
Co-authored DTIG's automated SharePoint migration tool set (Portainer, Terraform, Balena, Ansible, Chef, Docker, Kubernetes), drafting playbooks that accelerated enterprise cloud migrations.

experience.position: MICAH Legal Services Inc | Digital Transformation Director
bullets: Provided executive technology direction for a statewide legal-services organization, lifting access, performance, and scalability via a cloud-first strategy.
Established technical standards, modernization roadmaps, and governance practices to ensure system reliability and operational continuity for distributed staff.
Improved IT operations, staffing, and support processes, strengthening front-line service capacity and reducing downtime.
Directed initiatives to strengthen security posture and technology governance across a highly regulated environment.

experience.position: Tahoe Partners | Information Technology Solutions Architect
bullets: Established standardized methodologies for digital transformation assessments and audits across healthcare clients, identifying capability gaps and translating future-state goals into transformation strategies.

Directed cloud migration initiatives using lift-and-shift and re-platforming approaches; produced business models and documentation supporting modernization investments.
Developed cloud strategies aligned to organizational goals; provided guidance on cloud platforms and modernization trends.
Monitored privacy and compliance considerations and supported migration planning and execution.
Identified solutions to meet strategic and operational needs across mid-market clients.
Realigned stakeholder expectations and delivered a SharePoint upgrade and migration that moved data from SharePoint 2013 to SharePoint Online and SharePoint 2016 in a hybrid model.

Restructured the development team to improve delivery outcomes and identified and resolved operational challenges.

projects.name: Outcome.

projects.name: Outcome.
bullets: Sustainable AI-augmented engineering methodology adopted by the team; leadership equipped with responsible-AI guardrails and ethical-AI guidance.

projects.name: Outcome.
bullets: Migrated five server farms with zero interruption to emergency-care operations, the kind of state-of-good-repair discipline mission-critical agencies require.

projects.name: Outcome.

projects.name: Outcome.
bullets: Reduced IT spending by $1.2M; improved performance, reliability, and maintainability of collaboration systems at scale.

experience.position: Modern Workplace Consultancy | AI Adoption Program Lead, Software Engineering Transformation
bullets: Championed adoption of structured context-engineering and prompt-engineering practices across an engineering organization transitioning from ad hoc prompting to repeatable, measurable AI-augmented workflows.

entries.summary: Technology executive with 30 years of experience leading digital transformation, modernization roadmaps, and enterprise-wide technology programs for mission-driven, regulated, and public-adjacent organizations. Directs enterprise systems lifecycle, telecommunications and network infrastructure planning, cyber security, and cloud modernization across cross-functional teams. Champions adoption of contemporary and emerging technologies (cloud migration, Microsoft 365, AI readiness, Power Platform, RPA) and embeds training, skills development, and change management into every modernization program. Established a cloud-first technical standard and modernization roadmap for a statewide legal services nonprofit; led an on-site cyber security incident management and recovery cycle, re-architecting the affected network with segmentation and monitoring frameworks; reduced enterprise IT spending by $1.2M through information-architecture redesign; directed a no-downtime migration of five SharePoint server farms with zero interruption to emergency-care operations at University of Chicago Medicine. MS Information Systems (MIT); Master of Technology, Digital Transformation (MIT Sloan); BS Electrical Engineering (Notre Dame).
entries.skills: Digital Transformation & Strategy: Digital transformation, modernization roadmaps, IT strategy, AI readiness, technology adoption, change management, training and skills development, cross-functional alignment, operational readiness. Enterprise & Modern Workplace Systems: Microsoft 365, Microsoft Teams, SharePoint (Online, Server, 2013/2016/2019), OneDrive for Business, Exchange Online, Microsoft Copilot, Viva Suite, Power Platform, Microsoft Intune, Entra ID, Hybrid Work Solutions, Unified Communications, Employee Experience Platform. Cloud Computing & Migrations: Azure, AWS, Google Cloud Platform (GCP), IaaS, PaaS, SaaS, Multi-Cloud, Cloud Migration Strategy, Lift-and-Shift, Re-platforming, Cloud Cost Optimization (FinOps), Azure Migrate, CloudEndure, Metalogix, SPMT, Sharegate. Networks, Servers & Infrastructure: Network architecture, data center operations, Linux server administration (Ubuntu, Debian, Red Hat / RHEL, CentOS), mixed-OS environments, mail/DNS/web server configuration, VMware vSphere, ESXi, Hyper-V, disaster recovery, business continuity. Cyber Security & Resiliency: Information security, incident management and response, ransomware recovery, network segmentation and monitoring frameworks, Zero Trust Architecture, IAM/SSO/MFA, vulnerability assessment, penetration testing, risk management, IT governance, audit management, GDPR, SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA compliance. Data, BI & Analytics: Power BI, Tableau, Excel, data warehouse, dashboard design, business intelligence, reporting, MySQL, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Azure SQL Database, Cosmos DB. Process & Performance Improvement: Power Automate, UI Path, Nintex, K2, Zapier, Robotic Process Automation (RPA), Business Process Management (BPM), Lean Six Sigma, Hyperautomation. AI Adoption & Applied AI: AI readiness, context engineering, prompt engineering, AI literacy, automation strategy, OpenAI, Anthropic, Google AI, local LLMs (Ollama, LM Studio, Huggingface), model evaluation, responsible AI use. SDLC & DevOps: Agile, Scrum, Waterfall, CI/CD pipelines, Azure DevOps, Jira, Confluence, Atlassian Suite, GitOps, ArgoCD, Jenkins, Terraform, Ansible, Bicep, Docker, Kubernetes (AKS, EKS), Helm. Scripting & Automation: PowerShell, Python, Bash. Regulatory & Compliance: HIPAA Security, IT governance, policy governance, regulatory compliance, risk assessment, audit management, disaster recovery and business continuity planning, budget and resource management.

entries.summary: Technology executive with 30 years of experience leading digital transformation, modernization roadmaps, and enterprise-wide technology programs across mission-driven, regulated, and public-adjacent organizations. bullets: . Modernized engineering operations by embedding AI into the development lifecycle. Transitioned workflows from ad-hoc prompting to structured context-engineering frameworks. Developed internal training modules and KPIs linking AI integration to productivity and code quality.

Co-Authored DTIG Automated SharePoint Migration Tool Set (DTIG, Mar 2021 to Jun 2021). Designed and deployed orchestration and automation tooling using Portainer, Terraform, Balena, Ansible, Chef, Docker, and Kubernetes; drafted playbooks for cloud migrations of enterprise support systems.

Kaufman Hall SharePoint 2013 to 2016 Migration (2017) (Kaufman Hall, Aug 2017 to Oct 2017). Architected a fault-tolerant SharePoint 2016 farm; migrated all site collections; created executive dashboards in Power BI from AXIOM ERP and other LOB tools.
SharePoint 2010 to SharePoint 2016 Migration (Kaufman Hall, Feb 2017 to Apr 2017). Used a multistage migration path to consolidate SharePoint data from M&A activities.
Kaufman Hall SharePoint 2013 to 2016 Migration (2016) (Kaufman Hall, Aug 2016 to Oct 2016). Architected a fault-tolerant SharePoint 2016 farm; migrated all site collections from SharePoint 2013.
AD and File Server Migration, Rockit Bar & Grill and Rockit Burger Bar (Rockit Ranch Productions, Nov 2014). Migrated on-premise file and Windows Active Directory servers to SharePoint and Azure AD.

SharePoint Deployment, RRP Corporate (Rockit Ranch Productions, Jul 2014). Designed and deployed company resources to SharePoint Online; engineered data structures and workflows to automate business process management.

workspace.jobTitle: Senior Manager, Technology Transformation & Program Leadership

entries.summary: Senior transformation program leader with 30 years of experience leading complex, multi-year technology programs across healthcare, legal services, real estate, financial advisory, and SMB clients. Approaches every engagement through the lenses of people, process, and technology, serving as a trusted advisor to executive sponsors, translating strategy into executable roadmaps, and driving measurable business outcomes through strong governance, risk management, and value realization. Designs transformation methodologies that integrate program governance, technology delivery, change management, enterprise architecture alignment, and benefits tracking, then partners with client IT and architecture leaders to align business capabilities, application landscapes, and delivery sequencing. Fluent in Microsoft 365, SharePoint, Power Platform, Power BI, Azure, AWS, cloud migration, AI adoption, and modern-workplace enablement. Documented outcomes include a 28% knowledge-worker capacity gain at HIMSS, a $1.2M IT-spend reduction at Kaufman Hall, and a 60-day end-to-end ransomware recovery at Cognesense. MIT Sloan Master of Technology in Digital Transformation, MS in Information Systems from MIT, and BS in Electrical Engineering from the University of Notre Dame.
entries.skills: Program and Portfolio Governance: program leadership, multi-year program delivery, transformation methodology design, PMO standup, value realization, benefits tracking, executive escalation management, vendor governance, change management, change enablement, risk management, Agile, Scrum, Waterfall, CI/CD, Pipelines. Modern Workplace and Technology Enablement: Microsoft 365, Microsoft Teams, SharePoint, SharePoint Online, OneDrive for Business, Exchange Online, Microsoft Copilot, Viva Suite, Power Platform, Power Automate, Microsoft Intune, Entra ID, Azure Active Directory, hybrid work solutions, employee experience platforms, unified communications. Cloud and Migration: Azure, AWS, Google Cloud Platform, Multi-Cloud, Cloud Migration Strategy, Lift and Shift, Re-platforming, Cloud Cost Optimization, FinOps, Azure Migrate, CloudEndure, Metalogix, SPMT, Sharegate. Enterprise Architecture and Integration: business capability modeling, application landscape mapping, integration architecture, REST API, GraphQL, Microservices, SOAP, Single Page Applications, Progressive Web Apps, IIS, Apache, NGINX, Tomcat, Websphere. AI Adoption and Applied AI: AI Adoption, AI Readiness, Context Engineering, Prompt Engineering, AI Literacy, Automation Strategy, OpenAI, Anthropic, Google AI, Ollama, LM Studio, Huggingface, model evaluation, responsible AI use, AI workflow integration. Information Architecture and CMS: SharePoint Server (2013/2016/2019), SharePoint Online, Drupal, Joomla, WordPress, Confluence, Jira Software, LiveTiles, NextCloud, Azure DevOps, taxonomy design, metadata management, document management, knowledge management, information governance. Process and Performance Improvement: Robotic Process Automation, Business Process Management, Workflow Automation, Power Automate, UI Path, Nintex, K2, Zapier, Blue Prism, Automation Anywhere, Lean Six Sigma, Process Optimization, Hyperautomation. Data, BI, and Analytics: Power BI, Tableau, Excel, Business Intelligence, Data Analytics, dashboard design, executive reporting. Security, Compliance, and Identity: Zero Trust Architecture, Identity and Access Management, Multi-Factor Authentication, Single Sign-On, GDPR, SOC 2, ISO 27001, Penetration Testing, Vulnerability Assessment, HIPAA Compliance, Healthcare IT Security, Disaster Recovery Planning, Business Continuity Planning, IT Governance, Audit Management, Regulatory Compliance. Scripting and Automation: PowerShell, Python, Bash. Linux Administration: Ubuntu, Debian, Red Hat / RHEL, CentOS. Virtualization and Containers: Hyper-V, VMware vSphere, ESXi, Docker, Kubernetes, Azure Kubernetes Service, Amazon EKS, Terraform, Ansible, Bicep, ARM, CloudFormation, Helm, GitOps, ArgoCD, Jenkins. Database Backend: SQL Server, MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Azure SQL Database, Cosmos DB, DynamoDB, T-SQL, Stored Procedures, Database Optimization, Data Warehousing.

workspace.jobTitle: Senior Manager, Technology Transformation & Program Leadership

entries.summary: Senior transformation program leader with 30 years of experience leading complex, multi-year technology programs across healthcare, legal services, real estate, financial advisory, and SMB clients. Approaches every engagement through the lenses of people, process, and technology, serving as a trusted advisor to executive sponsors, translating strategy into executable roadmaps, and driving measurable business outcomes through strong governance, risk management, and value realization. Designs transformation methodologies that integrate program governance, technology delivery, change management, enterprise architecture alignment, and benefits tracking, then partners with client IT and architecture leaders to align business capabilities, application landscapes, and delivery sequencing. Fluent in Microsoft 365, SharePoint, Power Platform, Power BI, Azure, AWS, cloud migration, AI adoption, and modern-workplace enablement. Documented outcomes include a 28% knowledge-worker capacity gain at HIMSS, a $1.2M IT-spend reduction at Kaufman Hall, and a 60-day end-to-end ransomware recovery at Cognesense. MIT Sloan Master of Technology in Digital Transformation, MS in Information Systems from MIT, and BS in Electrical Engineering from the University of Notre Dame.

Security, Compliance, and Identity: Zero Trust Architecture, Identity and Access Management, Multi-Factor Authentication, Single Sign-On, GDPR, SOC 2, ISO 27001, Penetration Testing, Vulnerability Assessment, HIPAA Compliance, Healthcare IT Security, Disaster Recovery Planning, Business Continuity Planning, IT Governance, Audit Management, Regulatory Compliance. Scripting and Automation: PowerShell, Python, Bash. Linux Administration: Ubuntu, Debian, Red Hat / RHEL, CentOS. entries.summary: Senior Consulting Leader with 30 years driving enterprise Digital Strategy & Transformation, Operating Model Transformation, and Modern Workplace adoption. Industry Coverage spans Healthcare & Life Sciences, Legal Services, Real Estate, and Manufacturing. Trusted advisor to senior leadership at SMB, mid-market, and mission-driven clients; translates complex technical change into measurable business outcomes for CXO-adjacent stakeholders. Practice Leadership work product: built a standardized digital-transformation assessment methodology at Tahoe Partners, co-authored an automated SharePoint migration tool set at DTIG, and led cloud-first modernization at MICAH Legal Services. Delivery Oversight on enterprise-scale complex programs ranges from a $1.2M IT-spend reduction across a four-year Microsoft 365 modernization (Kaufman Hall), through hybrid SharePoint and Microsoft 365 migration at a global real-estate investment-management firm (Heitman) and a five-farm SharePoint migration with zero downtime to emergency-care operations (University of Chicago Medicine), to 60-day on-site ransomware response (Cognesense) and AI Readiness for software engineering organizations (MMR). Team Leadership through cross-functional team-building and adoption mentorship. Published on photonic computing, digital-privacy structural subversion, and AI reasoning strategy.
